hadithEnglish: The report is not like witnessing

book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

hadithEnglish: War is deception

hadithEnglish: A Muslim is a mirror of the Muslim

book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

hadithEnglish: Seek help for any needs discreetly

book.name: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi
book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

hadithArabic: الدُّنْیَا سِجْنُ الْمُؤمِنِ وَ جَنَّةُ الْکَافِرِ

hadithEnglish: Modesty is entirely good

book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

hadithEnglish: The word of the believer is like seizing of the hand

book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

hadithArabic: لَا یَحِلُّ لِمُؤمِنٍ اَنْ یَّجُهْرَ أخَاهُ فَوقَ ثَلَاثَةِ أیَّامٍ

hadithEnglish: He is not one of us who cheats us

book.name: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi
book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

hadithEnglish: A little that suffices is better than an abundance that distracts

book.name: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi
book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

hadithArabic: مَا قَلَّ وَكَفَى خَيْرٌ مِمَّا كَثُرَ وَأَلْهَى

hadithEnglish: Someone who takes back his gift is like someone who eats his vomit

book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

hadithArabic: الرَّاجِعُ فِيْ هِبَتِهِ کَالرَّاجِعِ فِيْ قَیْئِهِ

hadithEnglish: Affliction comes from (loose) talk

book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

hadithEnglish: People are like the teeth of a comb

book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

hadithEnglish: Richness lies in the richness of the soul

book.name: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi
book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

hadithEnglish: The felicitous person takes lessons from (the actions of) others

book.name: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi
book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

hadithEnglish: Indeed, in poetry there is wisdom and in eloquence there is magic

book.name: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi
book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

hadithArabic: وَ إِنَّ مِنَ الشِّعْرِ لَحِکْمَةً وَاِنَّ مِنَ الْبَیَانِ لَسِحْرًا

hadithEnglish: The king’s pardon preserves the kingdom

book.name: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi
book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

hadithEnglish: A man will be with whom he loves

book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

hadithEnglish: A man who knows his worth will not be ruined

book.name: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi
book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

hadithArabic: الْیَدُ الْعُلْیَا خَیْرٌ مِّنَ الْیَدِ السُّفْلَی

hadithEnglish: He does not thank Allah who does not thank people

book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

hadithArabic: لَا شَکَرَ اللهَ مَنْ لَّا یَشْکُرُ النَّاسَ

book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

hadithArabic: جُبِلَتِ الْقُلُوبُ عَلی حُبَّ مَنْ اَحْسَنَ اِلَیْهَا وَ بُغْضِ مَنْ اَسَاءَ اِلَیْهَا

book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

hadithArabic: الْتَّائِبُ مِنَ الذَّنْبِ کَمَنْ لَا ذَنْبَ لَهُ

book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi

book.bookName: Forty Hadith of Shah Waliullah Dehlawi
